scripts.zip: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/applysure.zip . --exclude '*.git*' --exclude 'api/*' --exclude 'vercel.json' --exclude 'node_modules/*' --exclude '*.md' --exclude 'privacy_policy.txt' --exclude 'assets/screenshots/*' --exclude 'dist/*' --exclude '*.zip' --exclude 'package.json' --exclude 'package-lock.json' --exclude '.gitignore'
